stemHtml: During a glide with idle power and constant IAS, if the RPM lever of a constant speed propeller is pulled back from its normal cruise position, the propeller pitch will:

options.a: decrease and the rate of descent will decrease.
options.b: increase and the rate of descent will decrease.
options.c: increase and the rate of descent will increase.
options.d: decrease and the rate of descent will increase.
